title: 小米：从哪里起飞，从哪里跌落
content: Xiaomi's stock soared from HK$12 to HK$60 following the unexpected success of its SU7 electric vehicle in 2024, driven partly by CEO Lei Jun becoming a social media phenomenon filling China's need for a business idol. However, the company saw its stock crash back to HK$28 by 2026 Q1 as car sales declined, smartphone shipments dropped 35%, and TV sales fell 22%. The article argues Xiaomi's core business fundamentals—thin margins in Android phones and volatile auto profits—never fundamentally changed. The author concludes that much of Xiaomi's rise and fall reflects market randomness and excessive public hype rather than genuine business transformation.
eventKey: 从哪里起飞-从哪里跌落
normalizedTitle: 小米 从哪里起飞 从哪里跌落

title: ChatGPT将迎史上最大改版，从单一聊天变身“超级应用”
content: OpenAI is launching its largest ChatGPT upgrade, transforming it into a "super app" integrating programming tools and AI agents. The revamp prioritizes Codex, its AI code generation product that has become a major revenue driver. OpenAI faces pressure to improve profitability ahead of a potential IPO, with Q1 adjusted operating margins at -122% despite $5.7 billion in revenue. Weekly active users have plateaued around 905 million. Competitors Anthropic and Google are also expanding AI agent capabilities for enterprise customers and deeper software integration.
